name: Kbd
description: Keyboard key indicator for shortcut hints. Kbd renders a single key; KbdGroup combines multiple keys in regular (adjacent) or separated (+ joined) layout.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element

states.rationale: Purely static display component — no interactive states, transitions, or animations.

propertyMapping.note: Editable text in Figma. children prop in code.
Boolean toggle in Figma controls visibility. In code, presence of iconStart prop controls visibility.
Boolean toggle in Figma controls visibility. In code, presence of iconEnd prop controls visibility.
Instance swap slot for left icon. In code, iconStart accepts ReactNode.
Instance swap slot for right icon. In code, iconEnd accepts ReactNode.
Boolean toggle in Figma. In code, controlled by children count.
Boolean toggle in Figma. In code, controlled by children count.
Boolean toggle in Figma. In code, controlled by children count.
Boolean toggle in Figma. In code, controlled by children count.

useWhen: Inline shortcut references in documentation or tooltips
type=regular: keys pressed simultaneously as one chord — system shortcuts, editor shortcuts, power-user interactions, dense documentation
type=separated: keys with standalone meaning or sequential actions — tutorial flows, gaming controls, onboarding, cheat sheets
doNotUseFor: Status badges — use Badge or Chip
Code snippets — use inline code or a code block

knownDeviations.description: No L4 color tokens in tokens.json. Uses L2 semantic tokens (surface-muted, text-secondary) directly. Only --dls-radius-component-kbd exists as an L4 token.
